versions.command: F:\WorkDir\locma\.venv\Scripts\locma depot publish ldraft runs/ldraft_s0.zip runs/ldraft_s1.zip runs/ldraft_s2.zip --kind model --parent b0k@1 --note E18b learned draft net (DraftEnv RL vs frozen b0k pilots, 300k picks, rollouts=3, gamma=1.0, opponent balanced). Beats the balanced draft with headroom, both arms + fresh-anchor confirms: reactive pair ppo:b0k_sX,ldraft_sX avg-hard3 0.791 (+0.1166 [0.104, 0.129] @18M, confirm +0.1028 @19M); planner vbeam:shared-ens,8,20,ldraft_sX 0.978 (+0.0541 [0.047, 0.061], confirm +0.0473). Both recipes of record since 2026-07-07. PR #76. --meta {"avg_hard3_reactive_pair": 0.791, "avg_hard3_planner_pair": 0.978, "g1_reactive_delta": 0.1166, "g2_planner_delta": 0.0541, "steps": 300000, "rollouts": 3, "pilot": "depot:b0k@1", "opponent_draft": "balanced", "items_per_deck": "3.9-5.2", "mean_deck_cost": 3.3}
versions.note: E18b learned draft net (DraftEnv RL vs frozen b0k pilots, 300k picks, rollouts=3, gamma=1.0, opponent balanced).
